title: Cleansing of Tatooine
content:

{{Otheruses|Battle of Tatooine}}

{{Quote|Throw it on the pyre with the rest… our work here is done.|Shaela Nuur|<ref name="shadows" />}}
In [[3993 BBY]], in the midst of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] team including [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] [[Duron Qel-Droma]], [[Shaela Nuur]], [[Guun Han Saresh]], and [[Cale Berkona]] ventured to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to '''hunt''' [[Terentatek/Legends|terentatek]] beasts left over from the earlier [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. After successful missions to several [[Planet/Legends|planets]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the Jedi group had established itself as the best the Jedi Order had to offer. After engaging several terentateks in a remote area of Tatooine's planet-spanning [[Desert/Legends|desert]], the Jedi slew all but one of their targets. The Jedi chased the last terentatek into a [[Cave/Legends|cave]], only for the beast to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Unidentified Jedi (Great Hunt)|one of their number]]. Unfazed, the rest of the Jedi killed the final terentatek and burned the corpses on a large [[Fire/Legends|pyre]].

==Prelude==
In the aftermath of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Sith faction]] led by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lords]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] and [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], many [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-created monstrosities were spread across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Although the Sith were defeated,<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> creatures such as [[silan]], [[Sith wyrm]]s,<ref name="kotorcg">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> and, especially, the vicious and highly dangerous [[Terentatek/Legends|terentatek]], still posed a major threat to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the general populace. In response, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] organized the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], a collaborative [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] effort aimed to eradicate these beasts wherever they trod.<ref name="shadows" />

During the Hunt, one Jedi group including [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Duron Qel-Droma]], [[Shaela Nuur]], and [[Cale Berkona]], along with [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Guun Han Saresh]], established itself as the best team of [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] the Jedi Order had to offer. The group trekked to [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] such as [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and [[Tython/Legends|Tython]], wiping out terentateks along the way. In [[3993 BBY]], they set their sights on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] planet of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="shadows" />

==The cleansing==
{{Quote|I made contact—it's confused. Go.|Duron Qel-Droma, while fighting a terentatek|<ref name="shadows" />}}
The Jedi tracked several terentateks into a remote region of the Tatooine desert, [[Death/Legends|slaying]] several and eventually chasing the last living one into a [[Cave/Legends|cave]]. However, before the group could launch a coherent attack on the beast, their target killed [[Unidentified Jedi (Great Hunt)|one of the Jedi]] who had led the team into the cave. Unfazed, the Jedi group redoubled its efforts. Qel-Droma used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mental]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] to confuse the terentatek, allowing Saresh, Nuur, and Berkona to attack the beast up close. The terentatek was quickly overtaken and killed, and the bodies of Jedi team's prey were burned on a large [[Fire/Legends|pyre]].<ref name="shadows" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Duron Qel-Droma, Shaela Nuur, Guun Han Saresh… thanks to your efforts, the threat of the ''terentatek'' has been ''eliminated'' from Onderon, Yavin 4, Tython… and now ''Tatooine'' as well.|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Aleco Stusea]] congratulates the Jedi hunters after their mission to Tatooine|<ref name="shadows" />}}
Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the successful mission to Tatooine, the Jedi High Council called an official end to the Great Hunt. However, the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Council]] selected Qel-Droma, Saresh, and Nuur—who had distinguished themselves on Tatooine and other worlds—to undertake a secret [[Cleansing of Korriban|mission]] to clear out terentateks from the Sith [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. On Korriban, the group broke apart, and Saresh left to [[Cleansing of Kashyyyk|hunt]] a terentatek that was rumored to exist on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] world of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Saresh was slain in his endeavor, while Qel-Droma and Nuur fell together in Korriban's [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]].<ref name="shadows" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Great Hunt skirmish on Tatooine first appeared in "[[Shadows and Light]]," a story published in [[Star Wars Tales 23|''Star Wars Tales'' 23]], that was written by [[Joshua Ortega]], illustrated by [[Dustin Weaver]],<ref name="shadows" /> and released on [[May 11]], [[2005]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54696/star_wars_tales_1999_23|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #23}}</ref>
